emails.subject: Legal Status Report
emails.body: Legal Status Report Hello Sara, Keegan told me that you had asked her today to send to you an updated Brokerage Agreement Status Report. We (the legal eagles) and the business folks agreed at the last meeting on 3/28 that I would distribute the report every two weeks every other Thursday. This works best for me and Keegan. Under that schedule, Keegan and I have planned that the report would be ready for group-wide distribution this Thursday. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693

emails.subject: Re: Legal Status Report
emails.body: Re: Legal Status Report thanks. I only asked Keegan for the most recent version since I misplaced it. She misread my message. In any event, I told her I'd wait for the updated version. Also, you know Stephanie is on vacation this week. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Cheryl Nelson@ENRON Sent by: Cheryl Nelson@ENRON 04/09/2001 12:36 PM
